headline.medium: AI Product Manager — shipping AI products.
headline.long: AI Product Manager candidate — I bridge the gap between AI research and real-world business value.

subheadline.short: Building for users, not just models.
subheadline.medium: Turning complex AI capabilities into simple, scalable products.
subheadline.long: I'm a founder and engineer who builds AI products. I focus on user problems first, then apply AI to solve them at scale.

about.tailwindClasses: py-20 px-6 lg:px-24 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-12 text-gray-300

lead.medium: I'm a Product Manager who speaks 'AI Engineer'.
lead.long: I don't just manage backlogs; I build systems. I understand the difference between a demo and a product, and I know how to take AI from 'cool tech' to 'business value'.

text.medium: I bridge the gap between stakeholders and AI engineers.
text.long: I can explain 'context window limits' to a CEO and 'business KPIs' to a researcher.

text.medium: I value shipping over perfect models.
text.long: A deployed heuristic beat a perfect model in a notebook every time.
The best AI product is one where the user solves their problem without knowing AI was involved.

bio.short: Founder & AI PM. Built VyapGO & DasetAI.
bio.medium: Founder & AI Engineer. I built and shipped VyapGO (Business Ops) and DasetAI (Data Platform).
bio.long: I am Samradh. I'm an engineer by training but a product builder by heart. I founded VyapGO and DasetAI, handling everything from user interviews to rewriting the inference pipelines. I want to work as an AI PM because I love the chaos of defining what to build, and the discipline of shipping it.

mission.medium: To build AI products that actually solve problems.
mission.long: To move past the hype and build AI systems that deliver tangible, boring, and beautiful utility to real humans.

metrics.tailwindClasses: flex flex-wrap justify-between gap-8 py-12 border-y border-white/10

vyapgo.name: VyapGO

oneLiner.long: An automated finance and inventory operation system tailored for the Indian retail market.

description.medium: Solved the 'Data Entry' problem for shop owners using Vision + Agents.
description.long: Small businesses hate typing. VyapGO uses multimodal AI to read invoices and voice commands to update ledgers.

vyapgo.logoPrompt: Minimal geometric logo consisting of interlocking V and G shapes, indigo gradient, vector style, white background

dasetai.name: DasetAI

oneLiner.medium: Instant synthetic data for AI development.
oneLiner.long: A platform that generates privacy-safe, statistically accurate synthetic datasets for testing.

description.medium: Solved the 'Cold Start' problem for new AI features.
description.long: Developers can't test without data. DasetAI generates 10k rows of complex relational data in seconds from a simple prompt.

dasetai.logoPrompt: Abstract node connection logo, purple and teal dots connected by thin lines, dark mode aesthetic, vector style

vacuumos.name: Vacuum OS

oneLiner.medium: A minimal workspace designed for deep work.
oneLiner.long: A digital workspace designed for deep, uninterrupted work, optimizing for clarity and outcomes per session.

description.medium: Optimizing for clarity and outcomes, not engagement.
description.long: Most productivity tools optimize for feature density. Vacuum OS optimizes for focus, converting goals into execution roadmaps.

vacuumos.logoPrompt: Minimalist black and white concentric circles, zen aesthetic, high contrast

description.medium: A minimal workspace for deep work.

items.problem: Productivity tools optimize for feature density, not focus.

caseStudyOutline.problem: Distraction is the default state of modern OS.

intro.medium: How we discovered and solved the 'Data Entry' pain point.
intro.long: We didn't set out to build an 'AI app'. We set out to stop shop owners from typing on tiny screens late at night. AI was just the how.

sections.heading: The Insight
sections.content: Shop owners trust paper because it's fast. Software is slow. We needed software to be faster than paper.

sections.heading: The AI Unlock
sections.content: Using Vision to read bills and Voice to record sales meant the user never had to type. The AI handled the structure.

sections.heading: Execution
sections.content: Built a PWA for distribution. Used FastAPI for speed. Iterated on the intent parser weekly based on failed queries.

title.long: DasetAI: Solving the Developer Cold Start.

intro.medium: Designing a tool for other builders.
intro.long: Every time I started a project, I spent 2 days writing seed scripts. I turned that pain into a product.

sections.heading: The Problem
sections.content: You build a beautiful dashboard, but it looks broken because there's no data. Writing 'Lorem Ipsum' 100 times is painful.

sections.heading: The Solution
sections.content: Define your columns (e.g., 'Name', 'Email', 'Transaction Amount'). Click 'Generate'. Get a CSV.

sections.heading: Product Market Fit
sections.content: Found immediate traction with hackathon teams who needed to demo 'full' apps to judges.

experienceSnapshot.description: Led product from 0 to 1. Defined the 'Invisible AI' strategy.
Built and launched a developer success tool.

education.description: Specialization in AI. Built products instead of just assignments.

description.medium: I turn vague ideas into concrete product plans.
description.long: I help define what to build, why to build it, and how to measure if it worked.

description.medium: I execute with engineering teams to ship.
description.long: I speak the language of engineering to ensure the product vision survives the development process.
